topic: Cell A cobot C150 position close to joint limits

messages.text: C150 is 'position close to joint limits' - a joint drove near its mechanical limit and safety stopped it. usually a bad waypoint or it was jogged into a corner
it stopped reaching for the far pick position
jog it back toward home into a safe pose, then check that waypoint - it's too close to the joint limit. clear the protective stop per SOP-2201 and re-home before resuming
jogged off the limit, adjusted the waypoint inward, re-homed, running
